name: Branch Network Monitor
description: Proactively monitors branch and ATM network health by correlating weather, power, ISP, and equipment data. Detects potential outages before they impact branches. For HIGH/CRITICAL threats, triggers automated response workflows via RHDH Orchestrator.

skills.name: Branch Network Monitoring
skills.description: Correlates weather, power, ISP, and equipment data to produce threat assessments for branch and ATM locations
